summary: The assembled graph captures a solid foundation of the voxlblade-builder codebase with 283 nodes and 308 edges covering core engine modules, data definitions, and UI components. However, it suffers from significant structural issues: inconsistent node ID/property formats from multiple analysis batches, 51 orphan nodes (18%) missing critical edges, 34 source files absent from the graph, and multiple edge type synonyms. The damage calculation engine (BuffData, TypedDmgBoost, DoTDamage, Perkbasedmg, crit, defense) and the orchestration layer (build.ts, DamageAnalyzer.svelte) are the weakest areas for cross-referencing.

issues.description: 6 important data module source files have no nodes at all: src/data/cdr.ts, src/data/defensivePerks.ts, src/data/draconicBuffs.ts, src/data/HealBoost.ts, src/data/Runebasedmg.ts, src/data/SummonData.ts. These are core damage-system data modules referenced by the engine.
2 important constant/barrel files have no nodes: src/lib/constants.ts (barrel re-export), src/lib/constants/rune-base-damage.ts (rune damage constants).

DamageAnalyzer.svelte (~6700 lines, the largest component) has 0 incoming edges despite being a central orchestrator imported by App.svelte. Many critical modules lack edges to the files that import them.

build.ts only has 5 outgoing edges but imports from ~15+ modules (data, enchant, weapon, shrine, constants, crit, defense, types, BuffData, TypedDmgBoost, etc.). Most cross-module import edges are missing for the core engine.
25 nodes have undefined type (type field missing). These are root-level config/doc files (package.json, tsconfig.json, index.html, etc.) from a batch that used 'kind' instead of 'type'.

Node ID formats are inconsistent across batches: 'file:src/...' (batch 1), 'file::src/...' (batch 2+), 'file:constant::...', 'file:interface::...', 'file:const::...', 'function::...', 'file:::root-file'. The double-colon pattern separates category from path in later batches but not in earlier ones.
Node display-name property is inconsistent: 78 nodes use 'name', 51 use 'label', 154 use 'title'. All three serve the same purpose.
Node file-path property is inconsistent: 214 nodes use 'filePath', 33 use 'path'. Both serve the same purpose.

Edge types contain 5+ synonyms for the same relationship: 'imports' (76) vs 'import' (15), 'depends_on' (11) vs 'depends-on' (1), 'related' (9) vs 'related_to' (3) vs 'relates-to' (1), 're_exports' (1) vs 're-exported-by' (10). This fragments traversal queries.
20 edges have undefined type (no type property set). These edges cannot be filtered or traversed by relationship kind.

51 orphan nodes have no edges at all (18% of all nodes). Critical orphans include: BuffData.ts (1838 lines), TypedDmgBoost.ts, damageTypeResolve.ts, all interface nodes (BuffDefinition, GrantedBuff, TypedDmgBoostCtx, etc.), and several important functions (resolveDamageTypes, applyFireAirConversion, resolveWaDamageTypeKeys).

Many Svelte UI components (34 files) from the scan are missing nodes entirely. This includes modal components (GuildModal, RaceModal, WeaponPartModal), filter components (StatFilter, TagFilter, WeaponStatFilter), shared utilities (StatFilterShared, filterActions), UI components (Badge, Button, Card, Section, Panel, Divider, Stat), and infrastructure (toast store, uiConstants, main.ts, ModalSearchHeader).

barrel re-export files (engine.ts, data.ts, constants/index.ts, modals/index.ts, ui/index.ts) have few or no 're-exports' or 're-exported-by' edges. These barrel modules are critical for understanding the public API surface.

Most nodes (207/283 = 73%) have complexity 'moderate'. The earlier batch nodes had more nuanced complexity (simple/moderate/complex). Later batches defaulted to 'moderate' regardless of actual complexity.
21 constant nodes lack 'contains' edges to their parent file nodes, making it impossible to traverse constants within a file.

The graph lacks import edges for the buff/debuff subsystem interconnections. BuffData.ts imports from ~10 modules (Boost.ts, constants/perks.ts, types.ts, constants/game.ts, enemyHpEffects.ts, etc.) but has no import edges.

JSON data files (armors.json, blades.json, handles.json, rings.json, runes.json, guilds.json, races.json, perks.json, essences.json, gloves.json, enchantments.json) have nodes but no edges to the data-access modules (character.ts, equipment.ts, weapons.ts) that import them.

recommendations: Normalize all node IDs to a consistent format. Recommend 'file:path' for files, 'function:path::name' for functions, 'constant:path::name' for constants, 'interface:path::name' for interfaces. Remove the redundant 'file:' prefix from sub-entity IDs.
Normalize all node properties: use 'title' consistently for display name (or 'name'), 'filePath' consistently for file path. Remove 'label' and 'path' aliases.

Normalize all edge types to a canonical set: 'imports' (not 'import'), 'calls', 'contains', 'depends_on' (not 'depends-on'), 'related_to' (not 'related' or 'relates-to'), 're-exports' (not 're-exported-by'), 'uses'. Remove the 'undefined' edge type by assigning proper types.
Add the 8 missing source files (cdr.ts, defensivePerks.ts, draconicBuffs.ts, HealBoost.ts, Runebasedmg.ts, SummonData.ts, constants.ts, rune-base-damage.ts) as nodes with proper summaries.

Add missing import edges for the buff/debuff subsystem: BuffData.ts imports from Boost.ts, constants/perks.ts, types.ts, constants/game.ts, enemyHpEffects.ts, and debuffCombatEffects.ts. Add all cross-module import edges for build.ts (currently only 5 of ~15+ actual imports).
Add 'contains' edges for all orphan constant nodes (21 total) and interface nodes (13 total) to their parent files.
Add edges for JSON data files (armors.json, blades.json, etc.) to their data-access modules (equipment.ts, weapons.ts, character.ts).
Add import edges for DamageAnalyzer.svelte to the ~20+ modules it imports. Add incoming edge from App.svelte.
Add nodes and edges for the 34 missing Svelte UI components (modals, filters, shared components, UI library).
Add 're-exports' edges for barrel modules (engine.ts, data.ts, constants/index.ts, modals/index.ts, ui/index.ts) to show what they expose.
Set the 'type' property for all 25 nodes currently using 'kind' instead of 'type' (root-level config/doc files).
Improve complexity ratings: the 207 nodes marked 'moderate' should be differentiated into simple/moderate/complex based on actual line count, cyclomatic complexity, and branching depth.
